creator: martin.von.reichenberg@protonmail.com
text:
Hello there any/everybody (I tried to mail office@FreeBSD.org with no luck) . . .

Will FreeBSD receive the latest update of Boost Libraries (Boost Libs) 1.86.0 - https://www.boost.org - anytime soon?
I am asking because it has already been nine months OUT-OF-DATE.

Also am considering installing FreeBSD again with qBitTorrent-NOX and its latest possible under-the-hood software . . .

I am pretty sure the updates contain "CRITICAL" BUGFIXES in which FreeBSD developers are so concerned about / keen in to. ;-))


Thank you for your reply!

Best regards,
Martin from Liberec, Czechia
